title: Cantera Columns
summary: Hand-turned column shafts and capitals cut from volcanic cantera, our founding specialty since 1999.

title: Carved Cantera Panels
summary: Relief-carved medallions, cartouches, and address plaques cut to your pattern or ours.

title: Indiana Limestone
summary: Fine, even-grained limestone for trim, banding, and facades that need a crisp, consistent finish.

title: Texas Cream Limestone
summary: Locally quarried Hill Country limestone with the warm tone North Texas builders ask for by name.

title: Carrara Marble
summary: Soft grey veining for interior surrounds, tub decks, and vanity tops that read as quietly formal.

title: Emperador Marble
summary: Deep brown marble with dramatic veining, popular for fireplace surrounds and bar tops.

title: Balustrades & Newels
summary: Turned or hand-carved stone balustrade sets sized to your stair run or terrace edge.

title: Window & Door Surrounds
summary: Cast or carved surrounds, keystones, and quoins that give an elevation real depth.

title: Thin Stone Veneer
summary: Lightweight veneer panels for retrofits where full-bed stone isn't structurally practical.

title: Full-Bed Facades
summary: Structural stone cladding cut to spec for commercial fronts, entries, and monument signage.
